theme_and_archetype.description: Editorial, magazine-like layout inspired by Cabana Magazine and luxury hotel systems. Avoids standard B2B SaaS tropes. Uses warm cream, deep ink, and espresso with restrained coral brand moments.

heading_font.name: Fraunces
heading_font.usage: H1, H2, large metric numbers, brand moments.

body_font.name: Geist
body_font.usage: Body text, UI elements, data tables, labels.

rules: H1 (Hero): text-5xl to text-6xl, tracking-tight, Fraunces.
Metrics: Oversized numbers in Fraunces, often italicized for secondary stats.
Labels: Small caps, uppercase, tracking-[0.2em], text-xs, Geist.
No generic 'Manrope' or 'Inter'. Strict adherence to the Serif + Sans pairing.

layout_philosophy.structure: Editorial layout replacing generic sidebar+topbar. Uses a sticky vertical text 'rail' on the left with no chrome. Top-aligned compact navigation with category labels rendered in Fraunces. Document-like structure with 1px Espresso/Ink section dividers.
layout_philosophy.spacing: Generous. p-8 to p-16 for main sections. Intentional whitespace to let data breathe.
layout_philosophy.borders: No rounded-2xl cards. Use sharp edges or max rounded-sm. Separate content using 1px solid borders (#E5E0D8) instead of drop shadows.
layout_philosophy.shadows: BANNED: Soft blurry drop shadows. ALLOWED: 1px hard shadows or pure flat design.

data_display_patterns.metrics: Oversized number with hairline divider + small caps label below. Numbers rendered in Fraunces.
data_display_patterns.tables: No outer borders. Just whitespace, ticking numerals, and 1px bottom border for rows. Minimalist.
data_display_patterns.status: Colored hairline beside number or text, NOT pill badges. Example: inline text 'Active' with a 4px coral dot.
data_display_patterns.inline_data: Inline data in flowing paragraph format (e.g., 'Room 204 has 3 pending bills').

motion_and_texture.texture: Subtle film grain texture overlay on the background using a fixed SVG noise pattern (opacity 2-4%).
motion: Hairline expansions on hover (0 to 100% width).

components.buttons: Flat, sharp edges. Primary: Ink background, Cream text. Brand CTA: Coral background, Ink text. Hover: Solid invert or subtle opacity shift.
components.cards: Remove Shadcn defaults. Cards are flat rectangles with 1px border (#E5E0D8), no shadow, sharp corners.
components.inputs: Flushed inputs. Only bottom border visible. Label floats above in small caps.
components.dialogs: Full-page side sheet with editorial spacing OR centered modal with a vertical hairline accent + serif heading. No standard shadow popups.

page_by_page_direction.login: Edge-to-edge dim moody hotel suite photo. Form floats in a sharp, small inset block (solid Cream) positioned asymmetrically (e.g., bottom right).
page_by_page_direction.dashboard: Editorial header. Primary metric (Today's Revenue) in huge Fraunces display type. Secondary metrics as a horizontal scroll strip. Status moments as flowing inline text. Recent Activity as a minimalist timeline.
page_by_page_direction.rooms: Numbered list-table hybrid. Room number in massive Fraunces text on the left, details tight on the right. No card grid.
page_by_page_direction.tag_inventory: Data table with no vertical borders. Status shown as a colored hairline indicator on the left of the row.
page_by_page_direction.gateways: Document layout. Gateway name in serif, status as small caps. API key hidden behind a text scramble effect interaction.
page_by_page_direction.product_catalog: Magazine grid. Asymmetrical. Image-led with hairline below the image, title in serif, price in sans. No enclosing boxes.
page_by_page_direction.billing: Invoice/document feel. Strict grid lines, ink color, small caps headings. Looks like a printed receipt or elegant ledger.
page_by_page_direction.housekeeping: Numbered rooms in large serif. Restock alerts rendered as coral text (not pill badges).
page_by_page_direction.reports: Minimalist charts. No axis lines or grids. Just the data line/bars with sharp tooltips.
page_by_page_direction.users: Minimal list. Role displayed as small caps inline text.
page_by_page_direction.license: Document style. Plans are columns separated by 1px hairlines. No 'highlight' card popping out with shadows.
page_by_page_direction.settings: Clean, document-like form. Input fields with only bottom borders.
page_by_page_direction.audit_log: Left-aligned thin line, time in sans-serif, event description in elegant serif.
page_by_page_direction.mobile_pwa: Confident, edge-to-edge images. Bottom nav uses thin, elegant icons. Solid blocks of color, no 'floating white cards'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Apply grain texture globally as a fixed background div with pointer-events-none.
Build the sticky vertical text rail on the left for branding/navigation.
Completely strip Shadcn components of rounded borders and soft shadows. Override to rounded-none or rounded-sm, flat borders, no shadows.
Implement the split-screen login with the provided login_bg image.
Do NOT use standard KPI cards; build the oversized metric + hairline divider component.
Ensure the coral color (#FF7E6B) is used very selectively for primary calls to action or brand moments.
